title: Manage mushroom substrate preparation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage mushroom substrate preparation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Confirm status of system requirements for mushroom substrate preparation

pcs.text: Determine details of quantities of substrate required, and dates and times to be achieved for each process stage, and inform personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine details of quantities of substrate required, and dates and times to be achieved for each process stage, and inform personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine details of quantities of substrate required, and dates and times to be achieved for each process stage, and inform personnel.

pcs.text: Determine availability, quality, serviceability and cleanliness of all rooms, work areas, machinery, equipment and materials for mushroom substrate preparation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine availability, quality, serviceability and cleanliness of all rooms, work areas, machinery, equipment and materials for mushroom substrate preparation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine availability, quality, serviceability and cleanliness of all rooms, work areas, machinery, equipment and materials for mushroom substrate preparation.

pcs.text: Allocate staff duties and responsibilities according to mushroom substrate preparation plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allocate staff duties and responsibilities according to mushroom substrate preparation plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate staff duties and responsibilities according to mushroom substrate preparation plan.

pcs.text: Identify and implement site quarantine protocols and workplace and personal hygiene requirements for mushroom substrate preparation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and implement site quarantine protocols and workplace and personal hygiene requirements for mushroom substrate preparation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement site quarantine protocols and workplace and personal hygiene requirements for mushroom substrate preparation.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.
